command: from pathlib import Path; import json, yaml; root=Path('benchmarks/sigma_xxx_finite_gamma_replay'); [json.loads(p.read_text()) for p in sorted(root.rglob('*.json'))]; [yaml.safe_load(p.read_text()) for p in sorted(root.rglob('*.yaml'))+sorted(root.rglob('*.yml'))]; [json.loads(line) for p in sorted(root.rglob('*.jsonl')) for line in p.read_text().splitlines() if line.strip()]; print('PARSE_OK')
